title: Keel Toys Keeleco Orangutan 27cm- Plush Toy 100% Recycled - Environmentally Friendly Toy for Children - Soft Toys for kids
features: Made from 100% recycled materials as part of Keel Toys’ eco-friendly Keeleco range
Features a soft and cuddly orangutan design with detailed plush fabric
Measures approximately 27cm – perfect for hugging and display
Embroidered eyes and eco-friendly stuffing ensure safety and sustainability
Suitable for all ages from birth (0+ months)
description: Product description The Keeleco Orangutan is a 27cm eco-friendly plush toy from Keel Toys' Keeleco collection. Crafted entirely from 100% recycled materials, including polyester made from plastic waste, this soft toy aligns with Keel Toys' commitment to sustainability. Its floppy design, weighted with recycled glass beads, makes it perfect for hugging. The Keeleco collection has recycled over 100 million water bottles in the manufacture of its eco-friendly toys, making it a significant step towards a greener future. Safety Warning No safety Warning
